name: campusway
description: CampusWay monorepo root — husky pre-commit hooks

scripts.build: npm run build:be && npm run build:fe
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:be && npm run test:fe
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.precommit: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
